'''鈭歡-ng-m''' ('''gangama''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cocaptain|cocaptain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ng-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cocaptain|cocaptain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-ng-m
|-
! Lemma
| gangama
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gangamithi|gangamithi]] || [[word:gangamiji|gangamiji]] || [[word:gangamishi|gangamishi]] || [[word:gangami|gangami]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gangamuthuth|gangamuthuth]] || [[word:gangamujuj|gangamujuj]] || [[word:gangamushush|gangamushush]] || [[word:gangam|gangam]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gangamuthu|gangamuthu]] || [[word:gangamuju|gangamuju]] || [[word:gangamushu|gangamushu]] || [[word:gangamu|gangamu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gangamufuth|gangamufuth]] || [[word:gangamufuj|gangamufuj]] || [[word:gangamufush|gangamufush]] || [[word:gangamuf|gangamuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gangamethe|gangamethe]] || [[word:gangameje|gangameje]] || [[word:gangameshe|gangameshe]] || [[word:gangame|gangame]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gangamothoth|gangamothoth]] || [[word:gangamojoj|gangamojoj]] || [[word:gangamoshosh|gangamoshosh]] || [[word:gangam|gangam]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gangamotho|gangamotho]] || [[word:gangamojo|gangamojo]] || [[word:gangamosho|gangamosho]] || [[word:gangamo|gangamo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gangamofoth|gangamofoth]] || [[word:gangamofoj|gangamofoj]] || [[word:gangamofosh|gangamofosh]] || [[word:gangamof|gangamof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gangam忙th忙|gangam忙th忙]] || [[word:gangam忙j忙|gangam忙j忙]] || [[word:gangam忙sh忙|gangam忙sh忙]] || [[word:gangam忙|gangam忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gangamathath|gangamathath]] || [[word:gangamajaj|gangamajaj]] || [[word:gangamashash|gangamashash]] || [[word:gangam|gangam]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gangamatha|gangamatha]] || [[word:gangamaja|gangamaja]] || [[word:gangamasha|gangamasha]] || [[word:gangama|gangama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gangamafath|gangamafath]] || [[word:gangamafaj|gangamafaj]] || [[word:gangamafash|gangamafash]] || [[word:gangamaf|gangamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:gangamasha|gangamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gogangamasha|gogangamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokigangamasha|gokigangamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:gangamn眉sha|gangamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gogangamnkn眉sha|gogangamnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokigangamn眉sha|gokigangamn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gangamsh毛sha|gangamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogangamnksh毛sha|gogangamnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigangamsh毛sha|gokigangamsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gangamrosha|gangamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogangamnkrosha|gogangamnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigangamrosha|gokigangamrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gangamusha|gangamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gogangamnkmusha|gogangamnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigangamusha|gokigangamusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gangamsherasha|gangamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gogangamnksherasha|gogangamnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokigangamsherasha|gokigangamsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:gangamngasha|gangamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gogangamnkngasha|gogangamnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokigangamngasha|gokigangamngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gangamyasha|gangamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gogangamnkyasha|gogangamnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokigangamyasha|gokigangamyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gangamyamasha|gangamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gogangamnkyamasha|gogangamnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokigangamyamasha|gokigangamyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gangamn眉sh毛sha|gangamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogangamnkn眉sh毛sha|gogangamnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigangamn眉sh毛sha|gokigangamn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gangamn眉rosha|gangamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogangamnkn眉rosha|gogangamnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigangamn眉rosha|gokigangamn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gangamn眉musha|gangamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogangamnkn眉musha|gogangamnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigangamn眉musha|gokigangamn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gangamsh毛n眉sha|gangamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogangamnksh毛n眉sha|gogangamnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigangamsh毛n眉sha|gokigangamsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gangamsh毛rosha|gangamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogangamnksh毛rosha|gogangamnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigangamsh毛rosha|gokigangamsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gangamsh毛musha|gangamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogangamnksh毛musha|gogangamnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigangamsh毛musha|gokigangamsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gangamron眉sha|gangamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogangamnkron眉sha|gogangamnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigangamron眉sha|gokigangamron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gangamrosh毛sha|gangamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogangamnkrosh毛sha|gogangamnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigangamrosh毛sha|gokigangamrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gangamromusha|gangamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogangamnkromusha|gogangamnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigangamromusha|gokigangamromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gangamun眉sha|gangamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gogangamnkmun眉sha|gogangamnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokigangamun眉sha|gokigangamun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gangamush毛sha|gangamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gogangamnkmush毛sha|gogangamnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokigangamush毛sha|gokigangamush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gangamurosha|gangamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogangamnkmurosha|gogangamnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokigangamurosha|gokigangamurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:gangam|gangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:g忙ng忙m|g忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hogangam|hogangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hog忙ng忙m|hog忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohogangam|hohogangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohog忙ng忙m|hohog忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉gangam|n眉gangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉g忙ng忙m|n眉g忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉gangam|n眉n眉gangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉g忙ng忙m|n眉n眉g忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂gangam|n茂gangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂g忙ng忙m|n茂g忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂gangam|n茂n茂gangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂g忙ng忙m|n茂n茂g忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lugangam|lugangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lug忙ng忙m|lug忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulugangam|lulugangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulug忙ng忙m|lulug忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:ligangam|ligangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lig忙ng忙m|lig忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liligangam|liligangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilig忙ng忙m|lilig忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kogangam|kogangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kog忙ng忙m|kog忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokogangam|kokogangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokog忙ng忙m|kokog忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kegangam|kegangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keg忙ng忙m|keg忙ng忙m]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekegangam|kekegangam]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeg忙ng忙m|kekeg忙ng忙m]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
